summary: Frontend-only testing for dark mode support and Rebranding package (€349). All 11 test requirements verified and PASSED via Playwright automated tests. Dark mode toggle works correctly, text is BLACK in light mode and WHITE in dark mode across all pages.
passed_tests: 1. PASS: Homepage (LandingPage.jsx) - Text is BLACK in light mode (rgb(0,0,0)), WHITE in dark mode (rgb(255,255,255))
2. PASS: Homepage DIENSTEN section - Rebranding service card (03) visible with RefreshCw icon
3. PASS: Homepage Pricing Section - 4 pricing cards visible: REBRANDING €349, BASIS €500, PRO €900, PREMIUM €1400
4. PASS: PackagesPage (/pakketten) - Rebranding Pakket €349 visible as FIRST card with Before/After demo component
5. PASS: PackagesPage - All 4 packages visible: Rebranding, Basis, Pro, Premium with correct prices
6. PASS: Dark Mode Toggle - Moon/sun icon in nav bar toggles dark mode, 'dark' class applied to HTML element
7. PASS: OverMijPage (/over-mij) - Headings and body text readable in both light and dark modes
8. PASS: WhyWebsitePage (/waarom-website) - Headings and body text readable in both modes
9. PASS: BlogPage (/blog) - Headings and body text readable in both modes
10. PASS: OnderhoudPage (/onderhoud) - Headings and body text readable in both modes
11. PASS: CalculatorPage (/calculator) - Package cards, add-on cards, price summary readable in both modes
12. PASS: DienstenPage (/diensten) - Service cards and niche links readable in both modes
critical_code_review_comments: Dark mode implementation uses Tailwind's dark: class variants correctly
Theme toggle persists to localStorage and applies 'dark' class to document.documentElement
Rebranding package correctly positioned as first card in both homepage pricing and PackagesPage
All pages have proper dark:text-white and dark:bg-neutral-950 classes for dark mode support
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 17: Dark mode and Rebranding package testing complete. (1) Dark mode toggle works via data-testid='theme-toggle' button in nav. (2) Light mode: text is BLACK (rgb(0,0,0)), Dark mode: text is WHITE (rgb(255,255,255)). (3) Rebranding package €349 appears as FIRST card in homepage pricing section and PackagesPage. (4) All pages tested: /, /pakketten, /over-mij, /waarom-website, /blog, /onderhoud, /calculator, /diensten - all have proper dark mode support.
